title: Supabase getSession() on server
description: getSession() trusts client-supplied JWT without server verification
remediation: Replace with supabase.auth.getUser() on all server-side code

title: Possible IDOR — no ownership check
description: Update/delete query may lack user ownership filter

title: Missing CSRF protection on mutation
description: POST/PUT route with auth but no CSRF token validation
remediation: Add CSRF middleware or use SameSite=Strict cookies

title: No rate limiting on auth route
description: Login/auth endpoint has no rate limiting — brute-force risk

title: File upload without type validation
description: File upload handler lacks MIME type or extension filtering
remediation: Add fileFilter to validate MIME type and extension allowlist

title: RLS not enabled on table
description: Table missing Row Level Security — all rows accessible to any role
remediation: Add: ALTER TABLE x ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + policy
